titleStmt.title: SII 26.368: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 368. (A.R. No. 347 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the temple-kitchen.

This inscription records an endowment of Rupees 130 with a certain Taṇiyāttaṉ of Maḻavarāya-gōttiram, belonging to Piḷḷaiyār-kuppam, and records that the interest derived from this should be used annually for the special abhishēka on the Āṉi-Tirumañjaṉam days for the god Chiṟsabhāpati of the (temple of) Tirupurāntakasvāmiyār, by the above-mentioned Taṇiyāttaṉ and his descendants. The above-mentioned abhishēka service was instituted by a certain Araśappamudali, son of Poṉmugari Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār of Kumārachchēri Kumāra[tair]-gōttiram, who endowed Rupees 80 for this and the balance of Rupees 50 was contributed by many others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Akilāṇṭakoṭi
pimmāṇṭaṉāyakaṉākiya
śrītirupurāntakasvāmi
yār ciṟcapāpatikku Āṉi
tirumañcaṉa Apiṣeka ta
ṟmam cālivākaṉam
1000 8 100 1 (1/2) piṟapavāti 10 2 (1/2) ni
kaḻum pekutāṉiya varuṣam m
paṅkuṉi mātam 10 2 tiyati
kumāracceri kumāratai
r kottiram poṉmuka
ri tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyār
kumāraṉ Aracappamutali
Apiṣekattu (1/2) piḷḷai
yār kuppam maḻavaṟāya
kottiram taṇiyātta
ṉ � 2 paṇṭu vai
tta rūpāy 8 10
ṉāvanta palaper paṇ
ṭu 5 10 Āka ṟūpā
130 yitil varum lā
pattai meṟpaṭiyār puttirapa
vuttira parampaṟaiyā
varuṣam m pirati varuṣam m Api
ṣekattai naṭatti varavum �
ṣa cantatiyāṉāl
Digital edition of SII 26.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
